description_long: This bollard features a tall, hexagonal column with a robust, geometric design, primarily rendered in a light gray color. The midsection is accentuated by a pair of octagonal collars, adding both structural strength and visual interest. At the top, a gold-colored, conical cap with a dark tip serves as a decorative finial, making the bollard stand out in urban environments. The base is also hexagonal, providing stability and a solid foundation for installation. The overall construction suggests durability and resistance to impact, suitable for controlling vehicle access or protecting pedestrian areas. The absence of visible connectors or chains indicates it is intended as a standalone barrier.
description: A tall, hexagonal gray bollard with octagonal collars and a gold conical finial, designed for urban access control. Its robust, geometric form and decorative top make it both functional and visually distinctive.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hexagonal shaft, octagonal collars, and the gold conical cap clearly.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, highlighting the symmetry and consistent profile of the bollard.
description_view_2: Rear view matches the front, with the same geometric features and decorative cap visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the uniform design and structural details of the bollard.
